title: Hot and Sour Soup

seo.title: Authentic Hot and Sour Soup Recipe - Easy & Delicious
seo.metaDescription: Learn how to make the best Hot and Sour Soup at home with our easy-to-follow recipe. Get that perfect balance of spicy, sour, and savory flavors!

Step-by-Step Instructions for Hot and Sour Soup

seo.imageAlt: A steaming bowl of authentic Hot and Sour Soup garnished with green onions and chili oil.
seo.imageCaption: Enjoy a comforting bowl of homemade Hot and Sour Soup, bursting with traditional Chinese flavors.

description: Experience the bold and comforting flavors of traditional Hot and Sour Soup. This classic Chinese dish perfectly balances the tang of vinegar, the kick of white pepper, and a medley of savory ingredients in a rich, warming broth. It is a culinary adventure in every spoonful, perfect for any occasion.

ingredients.notes: freshly ground, plus more to taste
mixed with 4 tbsp cold water to make a slurry

instructions.title: Prepare Ingredients
instructions.text: Slice pork or chicken, tofu, rehydrated wood ear and shiitake mushrooms, and bamboo shoots into thin matchsticks. Whisk eggs in a small bowl. Prepare the cornstarch slurry.

instructions.title: Simmer Broth and Solids
instructions.text: In a large pot, bring chicken broth to a boil. Add the sliced pork or chicken, tofu, wood ear mushrooms, shiitake mushrooms, and bamboo shoots. Reduce heat and simmer for 10 minutes, ensuring the meat is cooked through.

instructions.title: Season the Soup
instructions.text: Stir in the rice vinegar, soy sauce, and white pepper. Taste and adjust seasoning as needed, adding more vinegar or white pepper for desired hot and sour balance.

instructions.title: Thicken the Soup
instructions.text: Slowly pour the cornstarch slurry into the simmering soup while continuously stirring. Continue stirring until the soup thickens to your preferred consistency. If too thin, you may add a bit more slurry.

instructions.title: Add Eggs and Finish
instructions.text: While the soup is gently simmering, slowly drizzle the beaten eggs into the soup in a thin stream, stirring gently in a circular motion to create delicate egg ribbons. Remove from heat immediately.

instructions.title: Serve and Garnish
instructions.text: Stir in the toasted sesame oil. Ladle the hot and sour soup into individual bowls. Garnish generously with chopped green onions and a drizzle of chili oil if you like extra heat. Serve immediately.

tips: For the best flavor, use fresh white pepper and adjust the amount to your personal preference for spiciness.
Do not rush adding the cornstarch slurry or eggs. Pour them in slowly while stirring to achieve the desired texture and egg ribbons.
Hot and Sour Soup is best served immediately. If reheating, add a splash of broth or water to thin if it has become too thick.
article: Hot and Sour Soup is a beloved Chinese Soups and Stews dish enjoyed across Chinese. This authentic recipe brings traditional flavors to your kitchen.
